summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Merchant Transparency Ledger dashboard. All core features working perfectly including leaderboard display, tab navigation, War Room details, citizen demographics, and live donations feed. Dashboard loads correctly at /merchants route with all 5 sample advertisers displaying proper ranking and donation values.
passed_tests: Dashboard loads successfully at /merchants route with proper header
Weekly leaderboard displays exactly 5 advertisers with correct ranking (Faith Forward Electronics, Grace & Glory Apparel, Heavenly Harvest Foods, etc.)
This Week's Pool shows real-time total donation value ($50,800)
Prize breakdown correctly displays 1st=4 days, 2nd=2 days, 3rd=1 day exclusive ads
War Room tab displays $100K entry fee and 7 days exclusive prize with 'NO RUNNER-UPS' rule
Citizen Insights tab shows complete demographics (age distribution, gender split with 47% male, 53% female)
Live Donations tab displays recent donation feed with 5 donation items and LIVE indicator
Tab navigation works perfectly between all 4 tabs (Weekly Leaderboard, War Room, Citizen Insights, Live Donations)
Leaderboard table shows proper ranking icons (trophy, medal, award) for top 3 positions
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes for testing
Supabase integration working correctly with real data display
100% human verification status displayed in Citizen Insights
Solana blockchain transparency links and references working
Real-time updates with LIVE indicators on leaderboard and donations
Responsive design elements working correctly on desktop viewport
